  • Home
  • Digital Marketing
  • Marketing Analytics
  • Resume

On this page

  • Education
  • Experience
  • Skills
  • Certifications
Published

April 1, 2026

Education

education <- tribble(
  ~what, ~when, ~with, ~where,
  "M.S. Digital Marketing and Analytics", "August 2026", "California Polytechnic University, Pomona", "Pomona, CA",
  "B.A. Psychology", "December 2019", "California State University, Northridge", "Northridge, CA"
)

detailed_entries(
  data = education,
  what = what,
  when = when,
  with = with,
  where = where
)
Warning: Detailed entry formatter is not defined for this output format.
# A tibble: 2 × 5
  what                                 when          with            where why  
  <chr>                                <chr>         <chr>           <chr> <lis>
1 M.S. Digital Marketing and Analytics August 2026   California Pol… Pomo… <chr>
2 B.A. Psychology                      December 2019 California Sta… Nort… <chr>

Experience

experience <- tribble(
  ~what, ~when, ~with, ~details,
  "Data Management Coordinator", "2025 - Present", "A",
  paste(
    "Entered and managed community health assessment data to ensure accuracy and readiness for analysis.",
    "Performed data cleaning and transformation to standardize datasets, resolve inconsistencies, and improve overall data quality.",
    "Analyzed outreach and assessment data to identify trends, patterns, and insights related to community health needs and program effectiveness.",
    "Developed data visualizations and summary reports to communicate key findings to internal teams and support decision-making.",
    sep = "\n"
  ),
  
  "Freelance Graphic Designer", "2022 - Present", "Roxana Rodriguez",
  paste(
    "Designed and developed SEO-optimized websites that increased organic traffic, user engagement, and conversion rates.",
    "Built strategic brand identities aligned with target audiences to enhance brand awareness and market positioning.",
    "Collaborated with clients to translate marketing goals into data-driven design solutions that support campaign performance.",
    "Created digital and print marketing materials, including social media assets and promotional content to drive audience engagement and brand consistency across marketing channels.",
    sep = "\n"
  )
)

detailed_entries(
  data = experience,
  what = what,
  when = when,
  with = with,
  why = details
)
Warning: Detailed entry formatter is not defined for this output format.
# A tibble: 2 × 5
  what                        when           with             where why      
  <chr>                       <chr>          <chr>            <chr> <list>   
1 Data Management Coordinator 2025 - Present A                <NA>  <chr [1]>
2 Freelance Graphic Designer  2022 - Present Roxana Rodriguez <NA>  <chr [1]>

Skills

skills <- tribble(
  ~what, ~with,
  "Skills", "R programming, SQL, Tableau, HTML, CSS, Google Analytics, Google Ads, SEO, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe InDesign, Figma, WordPress",
  "Languages", "English, Spanish"
)

brief_entries(
  data = skills,
  what = what,
  with = with
)
Warning: Brief entry formatter is not defined for this output format.
# A tibble: 2 × 3
  what      when  with                                                          
  <chr>     <chr> <chr>                                                         
1 Skills    <NA>  R programming, SQL, Tableau, HTML, CSS, Google Analytics, Goo…
2 Languages <NA>  English, Spanish

Certifications

certifications <- tribble(
  ~what, ~when, ~with,
  "Graphic Design Certificate", "December 2022", "Glendale Community College",
  "Google Analytics Certificate", "February 2026", "Google",
  "Email Marketing Certificate", "October 2024", "HubSpot",
  "UX Design Certificate", "September 2022", "Google"
)

detailed_entries(
  data = certifications,
  what = what,
  when = when,
  with = with
)
Warning: Detailed entry formatter is not defined for this output format.
# A tibble: 4 × 5
  what                         when           with                   where why  
  <chr>                        <chr>          <chr>                  <chr> <lis>
1 Graphic Design Certificate   December 2022  Glendale Community Co… <NA>  <chr>
2 Google Analytics Certificate February 2026  Google                 <NA>  <chr>
3 Email Marketing Certificate  October 2024   HubSpot                <NA>  <chr>
4 UX Design Certificate        September 2022 Google                 <NA>  <chr>
